case_title: ALONGI, ALESSANDRO VS MARIA, DON INDIV. & DBA AS D & P DELIVERY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALONGI, ALESSANDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIA, DON INDIV. & DBA AS D & P DELIVERY $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $621.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISCHARGED IN ERROR INSTEAD OF OFF CALENDAR.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
